resources.string: App maeni i kum lembe maeni
Temo lembe ma juketho i ie lembe ma juketho i server
Warning: Ketho lembe ma malu i thenge maeni copo ketho battery peri ubed maleng\' nisagu ma con
Ng\'atu m\'utimo lembe m\'urombo ku cik mi ng\'om maeni
Custom URL epe, nyo epe. Icopo cidho i settings mi medo UL
Data U URuda ma ng\'ato nyalo ng\'eyo maber
Error moko ne otimore ka otemo loso
Ka wawinjo lembe ma jukiewo i lembe maeni
Jadit mi ot yath mi ng\'om zoo
Ka ng\'ato otimo kamano, obiro bedo gi geno mar timo kamano
Forecast \'%1$s\' utie lembe ma pire tek, nen file peri mi settings man tem kendo
Forecast URL uketho ngo, edit mi edit.txt ni loko
App maeni juloko ni lembe ma juloko ento server m\'ibetimo utie ngo ku lembe ma nyen ma Inigo Plugin utimo pi WeeWX. Fields copo nyutho ngo maber nitundo i kum ng\'atu m\'utimo lembe m\'ukwayere
I kind kare ma nok, lembe ma nyen ma juketho i tic man i ng\'eye
I ng\'eye, edok etimo tic mi lembanyong\'a i adhura mi Month
I oro m\'ukadhu, Stastic mi oro m\'ukadhu
Ju ma con gibed gitio ku lembe ma tung\' tung\'
Set ma nyen ma ng\'ato nyalo ng\'eyo, ng\'ad screen mar dwoko piny
Jam tic peri mir AP application peri
Liet %1$.1f°%2$s umedire nitundo i rwom peri mi %3$.1f°%2$s
Ka ng\'ato oting\'o app kata app ma ok onego oket
Lembe mi poyo wic mitire ni poyo wii ka lyethu, koth nyo koth utuc ikum rwom peri
Calu ma ikwero twero mi lwongo wang aryo, umitu iketh i settings kakare, launch settings?
Wakwayu nia ibed ikur saa ma wubiketho URL m\'ioro iri
Ka ng\'ato odhi ng\'iewo picha mar rad
Radar \'%1$s\' ok en adier, ng\'i file mag settings kendo item kendo
Radar URL ma juketho. Icopo cidho i settings pi niloko
Mi poyo wic kubang ceng ka koth utuc i rwom ma juketho
Koth %1$.2f%2$s urombo ku rwom peri mi %3$.2f%2$s
Koth %1$.1f%2$s urombo ku rwom peri mi %3$.1f%2$s
Rainrate pa %1$.2fin in the least %2$d %3$s utuc \'Severe\' level
Rainrate pa %1$.2fin in %2$d %3$s utuc i \'Warning\' level
Rainrate pa %1$.2fin in the lest %2$d %3$s utuc \'Watch\' level
Rainrate pa %1$.1fmm in the least %2$d %3$s utuc \'Severe\' level
Rainrate pa %1$.1fmm in the lest %2$d %3$s utuc \'Warning\' level
Rainrate pa %1$.1fmm in the lest %2$d %3$s utuc \'Watch\' level
Ponji ka koth ukadhu rwom ma malu malubiri ku kare pa koth
Lembe mi poyo wic pa koth?
Poyo wic ka koth ukadhu rwom ma juketho malubiri ku kare pa koth
Lembe mi poyo wic ka koth ukadhu rwom ma juketho malubiri ku kare pa koth
Be ing\'eyo ni idwaro ni ibed gi data duto?
Kawuono gin ma ng\'ato nyalo ng\'eyo
Kadok kumeno de, fodi asu lembe ma jukiewo i kum lembe mi ng\'eyo lembe
Nyuthu lembe wang aryo kubang ceng ka lyethu utuc i rwom peri
I oro maeni, Stastics mi oro maeni
Ne ok ong\'ere ma ne okwongo notimore notimore notimore notimore notimore notimore notimore notimore nonenore ni notimore nonenore ni ne otimore
Kende kende lembe ma nyen kende kende iwi lembe mi ng\'om?
Keth cing\'i i kum lembe ma nyen, ento ng\'atu moko mbe ma copo
URL ne oketo e default kata ma onge gimoro
Ti ku saa mi tio ku lembe maeni
Ne ok nyal tudruok kata ng\'ado bura kuom URL ma ne ochung\'ne
Ne ok nyal tudruok kata download data.txt kuom server mari
Ne ok nyal tudruok kata ng\'ado bura
Ne ok nyal tudruok kata ng\'ado bura
Ne ok nyal tudruok kata ng\'ado rad= cal ma wuok e intanet
Ne ok nyal tudruok kata keto gik ma ne itiyogo e server mari
Ne ok nyal tudruok kata keto picha mar webcam kuom server mari
Kite ma watio ko ku kusika mwa mir Internet ubekadhu kud i ie
Webcam URL utie ngo ma juketho kunoke ma ng\'ic
Ne dhi medo ng\'iyo toWFi tudruok ma ok nyal geng\'ore
